items.title: Flow Diagram
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
graph TD A["User enters email/phone number"] --> B["Call GET:/identity/validate"] B --> C["IAM service receives request"] C --> D["IAM calls SSO POST /user/exists"] D --> E_CHECK{Identity
Exists
in SSO?} E_CHECK -->|Yes| E1["Return: result = true
Identity already in use"] E_CHECK -->|No| F["Return: result = false
Identity available"] F --> G["Frontend: Show OTP screen"] G --> H["User enters OTP"] H --> I["Call POST:/identity with mode='create'"] I --> J["IAM verifies OTP"] J --> K_CHECK{OTP
Valid?} K_CHECK -->|No| K1["Error: Invalid OTP"] K_CHECK -->|Yes| L["IAM calls SSO POST /user/{ssoId}/identity
with mode='create'"] L --> M_CHECK{SSO Create
Identity
Success?} M_CHECK -->|No| M1["Error: SSO creation failed"] M_CHECK -->|Yes| N["Update IAM identities
Sync with SSO data
Call checkMember for new identities"] E1 --> END["End: Identity in use"] K1 --> ERROR["Return Error"] M1 --> ERROR

items.title: CheckMember Sub-Flow
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
graph TD A["For each new identity"] --> B["Call BMS getMember
with identifier"] B --> C_CHECK{Member
Found
in BMS?} C_CHECK -->|No| C1["Skip: No member found"] C_CHECK -->|Yes| D_CHECK{Member
Already Bound
to Account?} D_CHECK -->|Yes and Different Account| D1["Skip: Member bound to another account"] D_CHECK -->|No or Same Account| E["Create external identity
Type: 'fs'
UID: member.uid
Meta: member.metadata"] E --> F["Update default persona"] F --> G["Clear external identity cache"] G --> H["Send event
ob-iam.external_identity.created"] C1 --> END["Continue to next identity"] D1 --> END H --> END

items.title: CheckMember Sub-Flow
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
%%{init: {'themeVariables': { 'noteBkgColor': '#FFF4CC', 'noteBorderColor': '#D9B44A', 'noteTextColor': '#333333' }}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant F as Frontend
    participant I as IAM Service
    participant S as SSO Service
    participant B as BMS Service
    participant E as Event Bus

    U->>F: Enter email/phone number
    F->>I: GET /identity/validate
    I->>S: POST /user/exists
    S-->>I: Response (exists: true/false)
    I-->>F: Response (result: true/false)
    F->>U: Show OTP screen (if available)
    U->>F: Enter OTP
    F->>I: POST /identity (mode='create', OTP data)
    Note over I: [createIdentity] start add new identity: {identity} to accountId: {accountId}
    I->>I: Verify OTP
    Note over I: [createIdentity] check otp where id: {otpId} and idenfifier: {identifier} verify otp: {result}
    I->>S: POST /user/{ssoId}/identity (mode='create')
    S-->>I: Identity created response
    I->>I: Update local identities
    Note over I: [createIdentity] successfullay adding identity: {identity} to accountId: {accountId}
    Note over I: [createIdentity] created kafka event: {eventName}
    I->>B: Call checkMember for new identities
    Note over I: [createIdentity] start check member for identity: {identifier} and accountId: {accountId}
    Note over I: [checkMember] Start check member from bms with identifier: {identifier}, accountId: {accountId}
    B-->>I: Member data (if found)
    Note over I: [checkMember] Get member response: {response}
    I->>I: Create external identity (if applicable)
    Note over I: start create external identity for fs (external identity service)
    I->>I: Update persona and cache
    Note over I: Update default persona after create external identity
    I->>E: Send external_identity.created event
    Note over I: Connect X, update user identity to connect x
    I-->>F: Success response
    F-->>U: Identity added successfully

items.title: Flow Diagram
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
graph TD A["Client sends GET request
/members/by-account-id"] -->|with x-access-token
x-account-id| B["Request reaches controller"] B --> C{"x-account-id
header present?"} C -->|No| D["Throw CustomError
BMS_MEMB_001"] C -->|Yes| E["Call MemberService.findAll
with account ID"] E --> F["Query database
for members"] F --> G{"Members
found?"} G -->|Yes| H["Serialize member data
memberIndexInterface"] G -->|No| I["Return empty array"] H --> J["Return HTTP 200
with WrappedResponse"] I --> J D --> K["Return HTTP 400
error response"] J --> L["Client receives response"] K --> L

items.title: Sequence Diagram
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
%%{init: {'themeVariables': { 'noteBkgColor': '#FFF4CC', 'noteBorderColor': '#D9B44A', 'noteTextColor': '#333333' }}}%% sequenceDiagram autonumber actor Client participant Controller as MembersController participant Service as MemberService participant DB as Prisma Database Client->>Controller: GET /members/by-account-id
Headers: x-access-token, x-account-id activate Controller Note over Controller: Validate x-account-id
header is present alt x-account-id is missing or empty Controller-->>Client: HTTP 400 Error
BMS_MEMB_001: account-id not found else x-account-id is valid Controller->>Service: findAll(xAccountId) activate Service Note over Service: Prepare database query
filter by account ID Service->>DB: Query Member records
WHERE account_id = xAccountId activate DB Note over DB: Fetch all members
for the account DB-->>Service: Return memberData[] deactivate DB Note over Service: Serialize response
to memberIndexInterface[]
Include tenant info
Add derived fields Service-->>Controller: memberIndexInterface[] deactivate Service Note over Controller: Wrap response in
WrappedResponse
Set HTTP status 200 Controller-->>Client: HTTP 200 Success
{
"data": memberIndexInterface[]
} end deactivate Controller

items.title: 3. Context Diagram
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
    User["PARQ / OBK User"] --> Mobile["One Bangkok Mobile App"]
    Admin["Operations / CMS Admin"] --> CMS["OBK CMS"]
    Concierge["Concierge / Parking Ops"] --> CMS

    Mobile --> SSO["SSO"]
    SSO --> IAM["IAM / Identity & Persona Service"]
    Mobile --> IAM

    IAM <--> FS["FS Platform\nAuthorization, Parking, Visitor, Access"]
    IAM <--> BZB["Buzzee Bee / BZB CRM\nRetail Identity & Privileges"]
    CMS <--> IAM
    CMS <--> FS

    Mobile <--> FS
    Mobile <--> Argento["Argento\nPromptPay Payment Gateway"]
    Argento --> Backend["OBK Backend / Payment Callback Handler"]
    Backend <--> FS
    Backend <--> IAM

    FS <--> Turnstile["Turnstile Access"]
    FS <--> Elevator["Elevator System"]

    Mobile --> Notify["OBK Notification Infrastructure"]
    CMS --> Notify

    Mobile -. Phase 1.5 .-> OCR["TCCT OCR"]
    OCR -. Phase 1.5 .-> FS
    CMS -. Phase 1.5 Rate Config .-> FS

    Traffic["Traffic Monitoring Source"] --> Mobile

items.title: 1.1 Existing PARQ Workplace User
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
journey
    title Existing PARQ Workplace User Journey
    section Start
      Open One Bangkok App: 3: User
      Sign in with phone or email: 3: User
    section Identity and Persona
      SSO login succeeds: 4: User
      BMS member refresh runs without blocking entry: 3: App
      FS type is checked: 3: App
      Workplace persona appears when FS type is detected: 4: User
    section Use PARQ
      Swipe to Workplace home: 4: User
      Open Parking, QR, Elevator, Visitor Pass: 4: User
    section Fallback
      BMS unavailable but app entry continues: 3: User
      FS or previous Workplace permission not detected yet means Workplace home is not shown: 2: User
      Existing PARQ user without Retail activates Retail later: 3: User

items.title: 2.1 Existing PARQ User Sign-In
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
    A["User opens Login"] --> B["Enter phone or email"]
    B --> C{"SSO login succeeds?"}
    C -- "No" --> E1["Show login failure\nPassword or OTP retry"]
    C -- "Yes" --> D["Enter OBK session"]
    D --> BMS{"BMS refresh succeeds?"}
    BMS -- "No / timeout" --> BMSF["Continue app entry\nuse existing Workplace permission if detectable"]
    BMS -- "Yes" --> BMSU["Refresh Workplace member state"]
    BMSF --> F{"FS type or previous Workplace permission detected?"}
    BMSU --> F
    F -- "No" --> P["No Workplace home yet\nshow Retail or general OBK state"]
    F -- "Yes" --> G["Enable Workplace persona"]
    G --> H{"Retail + Workplace?"}
    H -- "Yes" --> I["Retail home first\nuser can swipe to Workplace"]
    H -- "No" --> J["Workplace home available"]
    B --> K{"Existing phone/email entered in registration?"}
    K -- "Yes" --> L["Show: Found your account please log-in with your password or OTP"]
    L --> A

items.title: 1. Current-State BMS Usage Summary
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
    SignUp["Current Sign-up / identity creation context"] --> IAM["IAM"]
    AddID["Add identity create flow"] --> IAM
    RemoveID["Add / Remove identity flow\nnot fully detailed in source"] -. repository traceability .-> IAM
    IAM --> SSO["SSO\nidentity exists + create identity"]
    IAM --> BMS["BMS checkMember\nmember lookup by identifier"]
    BMS --> Found{"Member found\nand not bound to another account?"}
    Found -- No --> Skip["Skip fs external identity creation"]
    Found -- Yes --> FSID["Create external identity\nType: fs\nUID: member.uid\nMeta: member.metadata"]
    FSID --> Persona["Update default persona"]
    Persona --> Cache["Clear external identity/profile cache"]
    Cache --> Event["Publish\nob-iam.external_identity.created"]
    AccountAPI["GET /members/by-account-id"] --> Members["Return members by x-account-id"]

items.title: 2. To-Be Options
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
    Decision["Decision Recorded:\nOption B non-blocking"]
    Decision --> OptionA["Option A\nBMS check only during sign-up\nand add/remove identity"]
    Decision --> OptionB["Option B\nBMS check during login as well\nSelected as non-blocking"]

    OptionA --> A1["Login remains IAM/SSO/FS/BZB focused"]
    OptionA --> A2["BMS affects persona activation\nwhen identity is created/updated"]
    OptionA --> A3["Lower login runtime dependency"]

    OptionB --> B1["Login adds BMS runtime dependency\nbut must not block app entry"]
    OptionB --> B2["Potentially refreshes fs external identity earlier"]
    OptionB --> B3["Higher latency/failure surface during sign-in"]

items.title: 9. Impact Summary for Decision Makers
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
    Current["Current confirmed BMS use\nSign-up + Add/Remove identity"] --> OptionA["Option A\nKeep BMS out of login"]
    Current --> OptionB["Option B\nAdd BMS to login"]

    OptionA --> AGood["Lower login risk"]
    OptionA --> ABad["Persona freshness depends on identity update/sync"]

    OptionB --> BGood["Fresher persona at login"]
    OptionB --> BBad["Higher latency + availability + QA scope"]

    BBad --> Decision["Decision recorded:\nOption B non-blocking"]
    ABad --> Decision

items.title: UF-001 Existing PARQ User Sign-in
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM / OB_IAM_SDK
    participant SSO as SSO / SSOClient
    participant BMS as BMS
    participant FS as FS
    participant BZB as Buzzee Bee

    U->>App: Start sign-in
    App->>IAM: GET /identity/validate
    IAM->>SSO: POST /user/exists
    SSO-->>IAM: Identity exists / not exists
    App->>IAM: POST /auth/login
    IAM->>SSO: POST /oauth/token with credentials
    alt Credential validation failed
        SSO-->>IAM: Auth error
        IAM-->>App: Login failed
        App-->>U: Show sign-in failure
    else Credential validation successful
        SSO-->>IAM: Token + Public SSO ID
        IAM->>IAM: Resolve Account ID and local profile
        IAM->>BMS: Non-blocking member check / Workplace refresh
        alt BMS unavailable or timeout
            BMS-->>IAM: No refresh result
            IAM->>IAM: Continue login; use existing Workplace permission if detectable
        else Member found and eligible
            BMS-->>IAM: Member data / fs identity metadata candidate
            IAM->>IAM: Create/update fs external identity and persona if allowed
        else No member or rare bound-to-other-account
            BMS-->>IAM: No member / conflict-like state
            IAM->>IAM: Continue login; mark support/audit path if conflict-like
        end
        IAM->>FS: Resolve external identity type fs + metadata
        alt FS metadata missing
            FS-->>IAM: No valid workplace entitlement
            IAM-->>App: Login allowed only if non-workplace persona exists / otherwise blocked
        else FS metadata valid
            FS-->>IAM: Company, tower, floors, FS member UID
            IAM->>BZB: Lookup retail identity by verified email/phone
            alt BZB conflict
                BZB-->>IAM: Conflict / different Account ID
                IAM-->>App: Conflict resolution required
            else BZB matched or no match
                BZB-->>IAM: Retail match result
                IAM-->>App: Auth response with Account ID and persona entitlements
                App-->>U: Continue authenticated session
            end
        end
    end

items.title: UF-002 Retail Account Matching & Persona Merge
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM / Account Merge
    participant SSO as SSO
    participant BZB as Buzzee Bee
    participant FS as FS

    App->>IAM: Request account matching / merge evaluation
    IAM->>SSO: POST /oauth/token with throwOnConflict: true
    SSO-->>IAM: Conflict state or token result
    IAM->>BZB: Match by verified email/phone
    alt Matches point to different Account IDs
        BZB-->>IAM: Conflicting identity result
        IAM-->>App: Conflict error; user must resolve to proceed
        App-->>U: Show warning / merge resolution screen
    else Matches share same Account ID
        BZB-->>IAM: Matching BZB identity
        IAM-->>App: Merge prompt / informational screen
        U->>App: Proceed with merge path
        App->>IAM: Confirm merge path
        IAM->>FS: Migrate/sync workplace permissions to surviving account
        IAM->>BZB: Sync surviving Account ID / retail linkage
        IAM->>IAM: Persist surviving Account ID and persona entitlements
        alt Merge persistence failed
            IAM-->>App: Merge failed / support required
        else Merge complete
            IAM-->>App: Updated Account ID and personas
        end
    end

items.title: UF-003 Sign-up & User Onboarding
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM / OB_IAM_SDK
    participant SSO as SSO / SSOClient
    participant FS as FS
    participant BZB as Buzzee Bee

    U->>App: Start registration
    App->>IAM: GET /identity/validate
    IAM->>SSO: POST /user/exists
    SSO-->>IAM: Existing / new identity result
    App->>IAM: Submit registration profile and credentials
    IAM->>SSO: Register / validate credential flow
    alt SSO registration or validation failed
        SSO-->>IAM: Registration error
        IAM-->>App: Registration failed
    else SSO accepted
        SSO-->>IAM: Public SSO ID / token context
        IAM->>FS: Validate workplace eligibility and external identity metadata
        alt FS rejects eligibility
            FS-->>IAM: No workplace authorization
            IAM-->>App: Onboarding blocked / cleanup required
        else FS authorizes
            FS-->>IAM: FS member UID, tower, authorized floors
            IAM->>BZB: Match by verified email/phone
            alt BZB conflict
                BZB-->>IAM: Different Account IDs / conflict
                IAM-->>App: Merge/conflict resolution required
            else BZB matched or no match
                BZB-->>IAM: Match result
                IAM->>IAM: Create/update Account ID, profile, persona entitlements
                IAM-->>App: Onboarding result
                App-->>U: Continue
            end
        end
    end

items.title: UF-012 Parking Payment & Ticket
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM
    participant BE as OBK Backend / Payment Handler
    participant FS as FS / Iviva Parking
    participant Pay as Argento

    U->>App: Open parking ticket/payment
    App->>IAM: Validate Account ID and session
    IAM-->>App: Valid identity context
    App->>BE: Request parking ticket/payment context
    BE->>FS: Retrieve ticket and payable amount
    alt Ticket not found or not payable
        FS-->>BE: Ticket error
        BE-->>App: Ticket/payment unavailable
    else Ticket payable
        FS-->>BE: Ticket ID, amount, exit status context
        BE->>BE: Create car_park_payments record
        BE->>Pay: Initiate PromptPay payment
        alt Argento initiation failed
            Pay-->>BE: Payment initiation error
            BE-->>App: Payment unavailable
        else Payment initiated
            Pay-->>BE: QR/payment reference
            BE-->>App: Payment QR/reference
            App-->>U: Display PromptPay QR
            Pay-->>BE: Payment callback/status
            BE->>BE: Validate callback + idempotency; update car_park_payments
            BE->>FS: Sync paid status to FS/Iviva
            BE->>BE: Write car_park_payment_fs_logs
            alt FS sync failed
                FS-->>BE: Sync error
                BE->>BE: Queue retry/reconciliation
                BE-->>App: Payment pending FS synchronization
            else FS sync successful
                FS-->>BE: Ticket/exit status updated
                BE-->>App: Payment completed
            end
        end
    end

    alt FS registration failed

items.title: UF-015 Elevator Integration
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.

    U->>App: Request elevator action
    App->>IAM: Validate session, Account ID, persona, tower context
    IAM-->>App: Identity/persona context
    App->>BE: Submit elevator request
    BE->>FS: Validate floor/tower authorization and call elevator
    alt Unauthorized floor/tower
        FS-->>BE: Denied

    else Authorized

        alt Elevator timeout/failure
            Lift--xFS: Timeout/error
            FS-->>BE: Command failed
            BE-->>App: Elevator unavailable / fallback
        else Elevator command accepted

            FS-->>BE: Success/status

        end
    end

items.title: UF-016 Turnstile Access
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App / My QR
    participant IAM as IAM
    participant BE as OBK Backend
    participant FS as FS Access Control
    participant Gate as Turnstile

    U->>App: Open My QR
    App->>IAM: Validate Account ID, session, persona
    IAM-->>App: Identity/persona context
    App->>BE: Request QR for workplace/visitor identity
    BE->>FS: Confirm current access scope and validity
    alt Not authorized
        FS-->>BE: Access not permitted
        BE-->>App: QR unavailable / access denied
    else Authorized
        FS-->>BE: Access scope and validity window
        BE->>BE: Generate QR
        BE-->>App: QR
        App-->>U: Display QR
        U->>Gate: Present QR
        Gate->>FS: Validate QR online
        alt FS unavailable
            FS--xGate: Timeout/no response
            Gate-->>U: Apply outage policy
        else Access denied
            FS-->>Gate: Deny + reason
            Gate-->>U: Deny access
            FS->>FS: Record denied access audit
        else Access approved
            FS-->>Gate: Approve access
            Gate-->>U: Open turnstile
            FS->>FS: Record approved access audit
        end
    end

items.title: 5.1 Existing PARQ User Sign-In
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM
    participant SSO as SSO
    participant BMS as BMS
    participant FS as FS/Iviva
    participant BZB as BZB

    U->>App: Start sign-in
    App->>IAM: GET /identity/validate
    IAM->>SSO: POST /user/exists
    SSO-->>IAM: Identity result
    App->>IAM: POST /auth/login
    IAM->>SSO: POST /oauth/token
    alt Credential invalid
        SSO-->>IAM: Auth error
        IAM-->>App: Login failed
    else Credential valid
        SSO-->>IAM: Token + Public SSO ID
        IAM->>IAM: Resolve Account ID + persona
        IAM->>BMS: Non-blocking member check / Workplace refresh
        alt BMS unavailable or timeout
            BMS-->>IAM: No refresh result
            IAM->>IAM: Continue login; use existing Workplace permission if detectable
        else Member found and eligible
            BMS-->>IAM: Member data / fs identity candidate
            IAM->>IAM: Create/update fs external identity and persona if allowed
        else No member or rare bound-to-other-account
            BMS-->>IAM: No member / conflict-like state
            IAM->>IAM: Continue login; mark support/audit path if conflict-like
        end
        IAM->>FS: Resolve fs external identity metadata
        alt FS metadata missing
            FS-->>IAM: No workplace entitlement
            IAM-->>App: Workplace unavailable / support path
        else FS metadata valid
            FS-->>IAM: Tower, floor, FS member UID
            IAM->>BZB: Lookup retail identity
            alt BZB conflict
                BZB-->>IAM: Different Account ID conflict
                IAM-->>App: Conflict resolution required
            else Match or no match
                BZB-->>IAM: Retail match result
                IAM-->>App: Account ID + persona entitlements
            end
        end
    end

items.title: 5.8 Account Deletion and Cleanup
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as User
    participant App as Mobile App
    participant IAM as IAM
    participant SSO as SSO
    participant FS as FS/Iviva
    participant BZB as BZB
    participant Kafka as Kafka/Event Bus
    participant Notify as Notification
    participant BMS as BMS

    U->>App: Request account deletion
    App->>IAM: Submit delete request
    IAM->>SSO: Update authentication/account state
    IAM->>FS: Sync entitlement/account status
    IAM->>BZB: Sync retail linkage/status if applicable
    IAM->>IAM: Apply soft/hard delete state
    alt Permanent delete reached
        IAM->>Kafka: Publish ob-iam.account.permanent-deleted
        Kafka->>Notify: Cleanup tokens/inbox data
        Kafka->>BMS: Cleanup downstream data
        alt Consumer failure
            Notify--xKafka: Failure or no confirmation
            BMS--xKafka: Failure or no confirmation
            Kafka->>Kafka: Retry / dead-letter behavior open
        else Cleanup consumed
            Notify-->>Kafka: Cleanup result
            BMS-->>Kafka: Cleanup result
        end
    else Soft delete period
        IAM-->>App: Account deletion state
    end

items.title: Visual Risk Summary
items.confirmationStatus: Source Mermaid detected; rendered as-is, no content invented.
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
    R1["Missing named owners"] --> Impact["Dependency tracking risk"]
    R2["Missing API error catalogs"] --> Impact2["Inconsistent fallback/support"]
    R3["Missing environments"] --> Impact3["SIT/UAT/PVT planning blocker"]
    R4["FS online dependency"] --> Impact4["Physical access outage risk"]
    R5["PII/consent gaps"] --> Impact5["Compliance risk"]
    R6["Payment reconciliation open"] --> Impact6["Paid-but-unsynced parking risk"]
    R7["CMS seed account risk"] --> Impact7["Data isolation risk"]
    R8["Missing proposal source"] --> Impact8["Traceability risk"]
